name: Kumar Hanwatkar
title: Software Developer

bio.short: Software developer experienced in full-stack web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and modern web tooling.
bio.long: I develop scalable and responsive web applications with strong focus on performance, usability, and clean engineering practices. During my internship at Coding Mitra (Codemate) IT Services, I worked across frontend and backend systems to deliver production-ready modules, REST APIs, and optimized user experiences. I also contribute to technical event leadership and bring strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and collaborative Agile development.

highlights: Developed LMS user module serving 1000+ users
Built full-stack systems with React.js, Node.js, and Express.js
Led execution support for GD Fest and inter-college hackathon
Hands-on with REST APIs, database design, and performance optimization
